title: Add pagination helper
description: Create `paginate<T>(items: T[], page: number, pageSize: number): { data: T[]; total: number; pages: number; hasNext: boolean }` in `src/services/pagination.ts` with comprehensive tests. The function should slice the array for the requested page and calculate total pages and hasNext flag.
existing_patterns: src/utils/chunk.ts — single-function utility file with co-located `.test.ts`, JSDoc comments, generic type support, and input validation via Error throwing
src/utils/chunk.test.ts — test structure using describe/it/expect from vitest with edge cases (empty input, remainder, single chunk, size of 1)
